problem id: 7b38ff97
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(1) OR SHR(5)) AND ROT(7)

examples:
  01011010 -> 00100100
  01000110 -> 00000010
  01001101 -> 10000010
  11011010 -> 00100100
  10101001 -> 01010100
  11011000 -> 00100100
  11111100 -> 01111110

query: 01010000
predicted answer: 00100000
